name: @ObserveRTC/observer-lib
description: Extractor Development Toolkits for WebRTC Samples

scripts.local-demo: npm run build-local-test && cp -r ./dist/observer.* ./__test__/pc1/js && pushd __test__/pc1 && npm install && python2 -m SimpleHTTPServer 9090 && popd
scripts.local-tokbox-demo: npm run build-local-test && cp -r ./dist/observer.* ./__test__/tokbox && pushd __test__/tokbox && npm install && python2 -m SimpleHTTPServer 9090 && popd
scripts.local-docker-demo: npm run build-local-test && docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up webextra-app
scripts.proxy-server: docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up proxy-server
